manifest.name: PR Quality Guard
manifest.description: Reviews pull requests for shallow tests, missing docs, and risky changes.

inboundTrigger.sourceCode: export default { async handle(event, ctx) { if (event.name !== 'pull_request') return ctx.noop('Not a pull request event.'); const action = event.payload.action; if (!['opened', 'synchronize', 'reopened'].includes(action)) return ctx.noop(`Ignored pull request action: ${action}`); return ctx.dispatchSelf({ reason: 'Pull request needs quality review' }); } };
